📡 Midn Core — CI Dashboard

Experimental LTE/5G Core Network · Rust · All crate test results in one place

Performance Targets
SubsystemTargetMeasured byStatus
Milenage auth vector < 10 µs cargo bench -p midn-auth ⚠ Stubbed (Phase 1)
GTP-U header parse < 500 ns cargo bench -p midn-proto ✓ Parser complete
ECS subscriber spawn < 1 µs unit tests (stress) ⚠ Phase 2
Concurrent sessions 100k+ stress tests ⚠ Phase 2
XDP packet decision < 200 ns kernel perf counters — Phase 3

midn-core

🚀
midn-userplane
UPF routing · GTP-U tunnel manager · eBPF/XDP loader (Linux)

Phase 3
⚡
midn-userplane-ebpf
Kernel XDP program · no_std · bpf-linker · Linux ≥ 5.8
Phase 3 — nightly only
Kernel Space
How to Trigger Tests
Include one of these tokens in your commit message or PR title. workflow_dispatch from the Actions tab always runs all crates.
--midn-auth --midn-proto --midn-core --midn-userplane --midn-all
Benchmarks are manual-only: Actions → midn-core: Benchmarks → Run workflow
Midn Core · Experimental LTE/5G Core · MIT
